use_cases: Display product status or category labels in e-commerce interfaces
Indicate feature availability, subscription tiers, or user roles in SaaS applications
Show notification counts, priority levels, or validation states in dashboards
Mark items as active, inactive, disabled, or featured in data tables
Visual feedback for form validation and inline error/warning states
ai_summary: A flexible badge component using CVA for variant management, offering multiple color variants (primary, secondary, success, warning, info, destructive) and appearance styles (default, light, outline, ghost). Supports three sizes and includes disabled states with focus ring accessibility. Built on Radix UI Slot for composition flexibility, designed for inline status indicators and label displays across SaaS, e-commerce, and dashboard applications.
